description: Extract the visual structure of a non-fillable PDF — text labels with coordinates, long horizontal lines (row boundaries), and small square rects (checkboxes) — to JSON. Wraps pdfplumber.
rules: read-only — opens the PDF, never writes it back
lines kept only if wider than half the page; rects kept only if ~5-15pt squares
needs pdfplumber at runtime; absent -> empty {} output + exit 0
usage: Set PDF_PATH (input .pdf). Output: structure.json (pages, labels, lines, checkboxes, row_boundaries).
limitation: Heuristic geometry extraction for non-fillable forms; tuned thresholds may miss unusual layouts. Requires pdfplumber.
